entries.next_gate: NW-C01 readiness package and Jayson-side proof
entries.readiness_basis: Notum's Watch and Sentinel durably own independent monitoring. Mission #284 defines only minimized read-only Glass Codex presentation with explicit freshness and denied control. Protected placement and execution remain Jayson-side; no telemetry connection, monitoring activation, or NW-C01 advancement is claimed.

Missions #279 and #282 establish Cloud Atlas protected-realm and Glass Codex client boundaries. Glass Codex is client-independent with a first-party VS Code direction, stable API lanes, denied authority, retention cleanup, packaging, and GUI-failure independence. PA-C01 remains current; no implementation, Apollo install, runtime, recovery proof, or later Campaign gate advances.

entries.next_gate: PF-C01-M02 Preview — Preserve the Old Flame
entries.readiness_basis: PF-C01-M01 remains accepted and PF-C01-M02 remains next. Missions #283 and #285 fix the public-clean Cloud Atlas topology plus Apollo/Hermes endpoint, isolation, source, reinstall, degraded-mode, and recovery proof requirements. Apollo/Hermes protected proof, native workflows, private route, Windows recovery, PF-C01-M02 exit, commissioning, migration, and runtime remain unproven.
